[[Category:Death]]
Euthanasia is the process by which someone voluntarily ends their life with medical assistance.

It’s sometimes considered a form of [[suicide]] however Lifeism considers it to differ in some notable ways.

It’s considered a [[suberogation]] and permissible legally and otherwise.

However by contrast [[living freezing]] is considered a positive thing and due to legal environments not differentiating the two the Church goes from neutral to legally supportive.
[[Category:Pages that existed before the Great November Outage]]
[[sn:Euthanasia]][[sn:Euthanasia]][[Category:Stubs]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
